body.title: [sprint] Request carries priority (fg/bg); INFERENCE_MODE stops selecting providers
body.intention: I intend that foreground/background is a request property and never forces a supplier or model.
body.description:
**Problem:** INFERENCE_MODE=openrouter|ollama welds fg/bg priority to a hardcoded provider — a category error that lets an env var pin a supplier. Priority is a request property; provider is a routing outcome.

**Shape:** Add `priority` (foreground|background) to InferenceRequest. Retire INFERENCE_MODE as a provider selector — at most it sets a DEFAULT priority, never a provider/model.

**Affected files:** devices/inference/device.py (InferenceRequest + remove INFERENCE_MODE source-select), shim/callers minimally.
**Design rules:** priority != provider; INFERENCE_MODE never forces supplier/model.
**Scope boundary:** IN — add priority field; retire INFERENCE_MODE provider-selection. OUT — the routing logic (T-inference-policy-router).
**Test plan:** a request with priority + no model is accepted; setting INFERENCE_MODE does NOT change which provider is chosen (only a default priority); grep shows INFERENCE_MODE no longer indexes _sources.
**Completion criteria:** InferenceRequest has a priority field; `git grep` shows INFERENCE_MODE no longer selects a source or model; requests carry priority, not a provider.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)

[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/ is the log hierarchy. Never write to a flat — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle: `rollback()` must be idempotent — safe to call even if — applies: tags: pattern, pattern-001 (source: docs/design_patterns_inventory.md#PATTERN-001: BaseDevice / BaseShim Lifecycle)
…and 38 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set

**[reconcile 2026-06-23]** SUPERSEDED: rules_engine.route(foreground=...) already exists. Residual INFERENCE_MODE-never-forces-provider cleanup folded into the tier-requests work.
